user.title: Connect to OpenClaw
user.description: Enter the connection details for your OpenClaw gateway.

hassio_confirm.title: OpenClaw Discovered
hassio_confirm.description: The **{name}** add-on was found. Do you want to set it up?

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate OpenClaw
reauth_confirm.description: The gateway token has changed. Enter the new token.

data_description.agent_id: The OpenClaw agent to use for conversations (e.g. 'default', 'butler')
data_description.session_mode: How conversation context persists: per device, per user, or per session
